visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video is a single continuous take filmed in a handheld selfie style. A young woman with long, straight black hair and prominent makeup is the central figure. She is dressed in a light lavender-colored cowl-neck top. The setting appears to be a modern indoor bathroom or spa area, evidenced by a white whirlpool bathtub visible in the background on the right. The lighting is bright and even, typical of indoor studio or home environments. As she speaks, she maintains direct eye contact with the camera lens, smiling frequently and exhibiting lively facial expressions. Her body movements are subtle, mostly involving slight head tilts and a shift in posture as she eventually brings her hand toward her chest in the final phase of her speech. No other characters or significant objects are introduced during the sequence.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 那天我去相親. (2) [Subtitle]: 相親對象. (3) [Subtitle]: 人還怪好的嘞. (4) [Subtitle]: 他問我. (5) [Subtitle]: 錢夠不夠用. (6) [Subtitle]: 不夠的話跟我說. (7) [Subtitle]: 他教我省.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female character filming herself in a selfie perspective.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman with long black hair, heavy facial makeup including eyeliner and lipstick, wearing a lavender cowl-neck top.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A modern indoor bathroom with cream-colored walls and a large white whirlpool bathtub with silver fixtures visible on the right side.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A female voice with a clear, youthful timbre delivers a narrative in Mandarin. Her speech rate is moderate and conversational, with a friendly and storytelling tone. Her pitch is slightly high but natural, showing some variability as she recounts the dialogue. A light, upbeat acoustic pop background music track accompanies the speech, featuring a steady rhythm and gentle guitar textures. (2) As the narration concludes with a punchline, a short, high-arousal meme-style laughter sound effect is triggered. This effect is loud and sharp, lasting about a second. The background music continues to play underneath this effect and remains consistent in tempo and volume until the video ends abruptly.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video's primary objective is to entertain through a short, relatable humorous anecdote. The creator uses a selfie-style monologue to share a story about a blind date. The twist at the end—where the date offers to 'teach her how to save' instead of providing financial support—serves as the comedic punchline, reinforced by the laughter sound effect.

high_inference.freeDescribe: A typical short-form social media video relying on a talking-head format and a comedic twist to engage viewers.
